headline: Here is What to Know Beyond Why Aptiv PLC (APTV) is a Trending Stock
summary: APTIV PLC (APTV) has received quite a bit of attention from Zacks.com users lately. Therefore, it is wise to be aware of the facts that can impact the stock's prospects.

headline: Why Aptiv PLC (NYSE:APTV) Passes a Decent Value Screen
summary: APTIV PLC (APTV) passes a 'Decent Value' screen with a low P/E of 7.88, strong margins, and solid liquidity. While growth is slowing, its cheap valuation offers a potential margin of safety for value investors.
